name: get-current-page-readme
description: Return README markdown text from the current GitHub repository page

readme.description: README markdown text from current page

manifest.page: () => { const el = document.querySelector('#readme article.markdown-body, article.markdown-body, #readme [data-testid=\"markdown-body\"]'); const readme = (el?.innerText || '').trim(); return { readme, path: location.pathname }; }
manifest.execute: async ({ page }) => { const readme = (page?.readme || '').trim(); if (!readme) { throw new Error('README not found on current GitHub page'); } return { readme, path: page?.path || location.pathname }; }
